zone_summary: Classify HttpStatusCode.BadRequest as user error in IsUserError()

behavioral_changes.summary: NodeExecutionUtils.IsUserError now classifies HTTP 400 / HttpStatusCode.BadRequest as a user error for the shared user-facing API error classifier.

grounding_evidence.reason: Adds BadRequest to the explicit HttpStatusCode user-error allowlist in IsUserError().
Adds numeric 400 to the same allowlist, ensuring raw/cast enum values for 400 are also treated as user errors.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: [DataRow(400, true)] // BadRequest - User error (invalid input, e.g. missing displayName)
grounding_evidence.reason: Updates the unit-test matrix to expect HTTP 400 to return true from IsUserError().

scenario_sketches.title: IsUserError returns true for BadRequest without widening classification to other non-allowlisted 4xx codes
scenario_sketches.rationale: Guard the newly added 400 classification in the shared utility and verify the allowlist remains narrow by contrasting it with a nearby non-user 4xx such as 429 and a 5xx code that should still return false.
